title: zeia biflora
intro: Zeia biflora, also known as the two-flowered Zeia, is a flowering plant species in the family Apiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zeia biflora include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Zeia biflora can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as used in topical applications like salves and creams.
